data.body: Investigation COMPLETE + remedy SHIPPED (2026-06-16). Conclusion stands: the slow suites were dominated by subprocess fan-out per rebar operation in the bash engine (cli.py python -> bash dispatcher -> ~7 python3 heredocs/write), ~0.6s/write x 25-97 ops/suite. The recommended remedy — the bash->Python strangler-fig migration (epic 8784 / adult-oxide-slave, Tiers A-E) — is now CLOSED, and the specific slow suites this ticket profiled (test-ticket-transition.sh, test-ticket-link.sh, test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh, create/edit) NO LONGER EXIST: tests/scripts/ has 0 remaining .sh suites; they were ported to in-process pytest, removing the per-op interpreter starts. No further action for this investigation; linked relates_to 8784. Closing.
